content.title: Your Goa Escape Awaits
content.description: Park Regis Goa is a five-star deluxe resort offering luxury accommodation in Arpora, India. Located in a leafy area near the Baga River, we are ideally situated within close proximity to Goa's iconic Baga, Anjuna, and Calangute beaches. Our 114 well-appointed rooms and suites feature colorful accents, Wi-Fi, flat-screen TVs, minibars, and tea and coffeemaking facilities; some offer balconies. Guests can enjoy our outdoor pool with a sundeck and bar, a fitness center, an informal buffet restaurant with a show kitchen, and an elegant lobby piano bar. We also boast the largest event space in North Goa, with a ballroom accommodating up to 1500 guests.

content.description: Park Regis Goa is perfectly located to explore the vibrant culture and beautiful landscapes of Goa. Our hotel offers a peaceful retreat while being just a short distance from popular attractions, stunning beaches, and lively markets. Enjoy easy access to the best of Goa, whether you're looking for relaxation or adventure. We provide a comfortable and welcoming base for your unforgettable Goan experience.

content.heading: Delicious Food & Drinks at Park Regis Goa

content.title: Dining Timings
content.additionalNote: Please contact us for special early breakfast or late dinner arrangements.

images.alt: Dining area with a breakfast buffet
Lounge bar area with comfortable seating

paragraphs.text: At Park Regis Goa, we invite you to explore a world of flavors through our diverse dining options. Our restaurants and bars are designed to offer unique culinary experiences, from authentic Asian dishes to contemporary all-day dining. We focus on fresh ingredients and expertly prepared meals to delight every palate.

Kai Asian Speciality Restaurant promises an exotic journey with its authentic Asian cuisine. Our skilled chefs use the freshest ingredients, creating dishes that are both flavorful and memorable. For a more relaxed setting, Spice'd Coffee Shop provides a contemporary atmosphere overlooking our beautiful grounds, where you can watch our local chefs prepare delicious meals right before your eyes.

Spice'd Coffee Shop offers a vibrant all-day dining experience, perfect for breakfast, lunch, or dinner. Enjoy a wide array of sumptuous delicacies crafted with care. The ambiance is modern and inviting, making it a great spot for any meal. You can witness the culinary artistry firsthand at our live cooking stations.

For evening relaxation, the elegant Piano Bar on the Lobby Level is ideal for enjoying your favorite drinks with family and friends. Choose from an extensive selection of cocktails, champagne, and single-malt whiskies in a sophisticated setting. Additionally, the Kai Pool Bar offers refreshing beverages and light bites by the poolside, perfect for unwinding under the sun.

content.mainHeading: A Culinary Journey at Park Regis Goa

content.imageAlt: Scenic beach in Goa with palm trees and blue water
paragraphs: Goa, India's smallest state, is famous for its stunning beaches, rich history, and vibrant culture. You can relax on sandy shores like Baga and Palolem, explore old Portuguese churches and temples, or enjoy lively markets. The mix of Indian and Portuguese influences makes Goa a truly special place to visit.

Beyond the beaches, Goa offers a variety of experiences. Discover the charm of Old Goa with its UNESCO World Heritage sites, taste delicious seafood and local Goan cuisine, or explore spice plantations. The state is also known for its festive spirit, with events and celebrations happening throughout the year.

Whether you are looking for adventure, relaxation, or cultural immersion, Goa has something for everyone. Its beautiful landscapes, friendly locals, and unique atmosphere make it a perfect destination for travelers seeking a memorable getaway.

sections.title: Website Usage

points.text: The content on this website is for general information only and may change without notice.
Unauthorized use of this website may lead to a claim for damages and/or be a criminal offense.
We are not responsible for the content of external websites linked from our site.

sections.description: By using the Park Regis Goa website, you agree to these terms and conditions. Please read them carefully.

sections.title: Hotel Policies

points.text: Pets are not allowed on the property.
Smoking is allowed in designated areas.
Parking is available for guests.

sections.description: Important policies regarding your stay at Park Regis Goa.

sections.title: Availability and Confirmation

points.text: All room bookings are subject to availability.
A booking is confirmed once you receive a confirmation email with a booking reference number.
Please check your booking details carefully upon receipt of confirmation.

sections.description: Details about how bookings are made and confirmed at Park Regis Goa.

points.text: Changes to bookings depend on room availability and may incur additional charges.
Contact our reservations team directly to request any changes to your booking.
Modification requests are not guaranteed and are subject to hotel discretion.

sections.title: Cancellation Terms

points.text: Cancellation and prepayment policies vary by room type.
Free cancellation (100% refund) is available if you cancel before the check-in time.
Cancellations made after the free cancellation period may result in charges.

sections.description: Our policy regarding cancellations and associated fees.

sections.title: Refund Conditions

points.text: Refunds for eligible cancellations will be processed according to the original payment method.
Processing times for refunds may vary depending on your bank or payment provider.
No-shows will be charged the full amount of the reservation.

sections.description: How refunds are processed for eligible cancellations.

sections.title: Check-In Procedures

points.text: Check-in time is 2:00 PM.
Guests must present a valid photo ID and the credit card used for booking upon check-in.
Minimum age for check-in is 18 years old.

sections.description: Important details for your arrival at Park Regis Goa.

sections.title: Check-Out Procedures

points.text: Check-out time is 11:00 AM.
Late check-out may be available upon request and is subject to additional charges and availability.
Please return all room keys and access cards at check-out.

sections.description: Information for your departure from Park Regis Goa.

sections.title: Accepted Payment Methods

points.text: We accept major credit cards (Visa, MasterCard, American Express) and debit cards.
Cash payments are accepted at the front desk.
Bank transfers may be arranged for advance payments; please contact us for details.

sections.description: Information on how to pay for your stay at Park Regis Goa.

sections.title: Taxes and Additional Charges

points.text: All prices are subject to applicable local and government taxes.
Additional charges may apply for services such as mini-bar, room service, and laundry.
A security deposit may be required upon check-in, refundable upon check-out.

sections.description: Details on taxes and other potential charges.
